title: pithecellobium costaricense
intro: Pithecellobium costaricense, also known as the "Coral Tree", is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pithecellobium costaricense include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
